User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account registrations, authorization levels, and device management inside the inventory workspace.

uid.description: Unique Google or Email Authentication UID.

name.description: Full display name of the operator.

role.description: Authorization level of this user profile.

status.description: Current authorization state of the operator profile.

failedAttempts.description: Failed password attempt counter before account lock.

devices.description: Array of active logged-in device fingerprints/IDs.

InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: Core electronics systems, spare parts, and diagnostic pieces in stock.

id.description: Unique product barcode or alphanumeric ID.

brand.description: Manufacturing brand name eg. Hikvision, Dahua, CP Plus.

category.description: Component or equipment class eg. CCTV IP Dome, Hard Drive, PoE Switch.

quantity.description: Current on-hand stock pieces in local stores.

minQuantity.description: Minimum inventory threshhold before triggering automated low stock SMS/alerts.

location.description: Physical warehouse storage bin or shelf reference.

MovementLog.title: Stock Movement Log
MovementLog.description: Single chronological audit trail documentation of warehouse stock entry or extraction.

quantityChange.description: Quantity added positive or deducted negative.

operatorName.description: Staff or Admin who logged the transaction.

notes.description: Optional memo describing transfer reason or order numbers.

Customer.title: Customer Profile
Customer.description: Customer contact directory entries tracking history and details.

name.description: Customer individual or commercial business name.

phone.description: E.164 formatted WhatsApp active mobile sequence.

address.description: Operational shipping or diagnostic on-site address.

ServiceJob.title: Service Job Ticket
ServiceJob.description: A single electronic diagnostic job ticket containing devices, technician assignments, charges, and history.

id.description: Job ticket sequential unique reference identifier.

customerId.description: ID of the customer who brought in the hardware.

waEnabled.description: Determines if WhatsApp updates broadcast automatically.

grandTotal.description: Calculated total including services, custom modifications, spares, and discount allocations.

paidAmount.description: Total amount paid advanced or completed.

QRLoginSession.title: QR Access Code Session
QRLoginSession.description: Sync handshake tokens representing active quick-scan pairing logons.

sessionId.description: Cryptographically secure dynamic token UUID scanned in the barcode.

token.description: Active session token shared post handshake.

DeviceConnection.title: Registered Device Node
DeviceConnection.description: Active connected remote client device instances monitoring alerts.

registeredBy.description: User UID who enrolled the hardware model.

AuditLog.title: System Audit Log
AuditLog.description: Tracks sign ins, lockouts, verification, device registration, and password activities.

/users/{userId}.description: Store operator profile files and active access roles.

/inventory/{productId}.description: Main catalogue list of spare parts and retail products in warehouse ranges.

/movement_logs/{logId}.description: Real-time ledger historical actions auditing entries/exemptions from storage folders.

/service_jobs/{jobId}.description: Active electronic service jobs tickets directory.

/qr_login_sessions/{sessionId}.description: Pending instant and secure multi-user pairing Handshakes.

/devices/{deviceId}.description: Registered messaging targets for auto-receiving hardware status pushes.

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: System wide operators tracking audit ledger.
